subject: [PATCH v10 02/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch renames the uffd-wp PTE bit macros to simply 'uffd' across various architectures, including x86 and arm64. The rename is a mechanical change only, without any changes in behavior. This is done because the uffd-wp bit will soon have an additional consumer, userfaultfd RWP, which uses it for access-tracking PTEs. The VMA flag determines the WP vs RWP semantics of this bit, and the rename reflects that the bit simply indicates that userfaultfd has claimed the entry.
